series_description: Applications, Executive Director review form, board rosters, supporting documents, approval letters, rejection letters, resignation letters, and vacate letters.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the end of the biennium (June 30) occurring no sooner than two years after the last day of the appointment term. ; Paper: Retain until the end of the biennium (June 30) occurring no sooner than two years after the last day of the appointment term.

series_description: Inventory of controlled substances taken every 2 years as required by the Drug Enforcement Agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years from the date of inventory ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from the date of inventory

series_description: Form used to order bulk and PRN (as needed) medications from the pharmacy. Includes hospital name, patient name and no., drug name and strength, amount of drug needed, person requesting etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Form which documents line item 419 allocations to community mental health agencies. Includes board name, agency Central Pharmacy number, agency name, line item 419 allocation, and total line item 419 allocation.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Form to document medications obtained from the contingency cabinet by nursing personnel. Includes patient name, patient no., ordering physician, drug name and strength, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Report generated to accompany each shipment of drugs to the facilities served. Serves as accountability record of drugs received for the facilities and may provide a total cost figure for those drugs.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Hard copy of dispensing and Patient Care System (PCS) transactions. Includes patient name, drug name and strength, quantity, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years from the date of dispensing ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from the date of dispensing

series_description: Records for dangerous drugs/controlled substances showing drug name, strength, dosage form, quantity, expiration date and lot no., issued to/by, date and signature for receipt, and administration documentation which includes patient names.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years after the date the last dosage was administered ; Paper: Retain 3 years after the date the last dosage was administered

series_description: Hard copy records of dispensing of drugs. Includes but is not limited to: daily transportation reports, packing lists and prescription (script) journals.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Reports received from the State Board of Pharmacy, Drug Enforcement Agency, or other drug investigators with recommendations as to improvements, corrections, etc., of the operations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Records of drugs purchased, received, or transferred into a facility. This includes but is not limited to issue listings, records of receipts, invoices, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_title: Drug Requisitions and/or Floor Stock Order
series_description: Requisitions for drugs in bulk or unit dose packages destined for floor stock/patient use which are submitted to the pharmacy by other area within the hospital.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: A check off sheet used by the pharmacists or designee while performing inspections of areas where medications are stored. Includes information regarding storage, labeling, emergency kits, reference material, record keeping, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Medication orders issued by a practitioner for an inpatient; may be an original written order, a direct carbonized copy, or facsimile or such order.
retention_statement: Electronic: If these are the only records showing the pharmacist responsible for dispensing the drug, maintain for 3 years in a readily retrievable manner ; Paper: If these are the only records showing the pharmacist responsible for dispensing the drug, maintain for 3 years in a readily retrievable manner

series_description: Record listing the medications which are returned for credit to Central Pharmacy by the clinics. Generally these are medications not picked up by the client.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years after receipt ; Paper: Retain 3 years after receipt

series_description: Incident reports and hospital plans which must be retained due to Joint Commission regulations
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years ; Paper: Retain for 3 years

series_description: Form used to document delivery services tracking and information to answer questions about drug order turn around. A copy of the daily dispensing record and a copy of the customer packing list are attached to this form.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 fiscal year ; Paper: Retain 1 fiscal year

series_description: Form for recording responses to questions asked regarding medication handling procedures at community mental health agencies during Central Pharmacy procedural reviews conducted by the Central pharmacy personnel.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until final report is completed ; Paper: Retain until final report is completed

series_description: Pre-printed listing of PSC items which is used to inventory drugs in all medication holding area throughout the pharmacy area.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until totals are verified against the Institutional Inventory Dollar values Detail Report ; Paper: Retain until totals are verified against the Institutional Inventory Dollar values Detail Report

series_description: Form completed to document missing doses of medication at the ward level and replacement doses issued by the pharmacy.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Data sheet containing medical information on Central Pharmacy clients, including demographic data, allergies, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the dispensing pharmacist checks against patient profile ; Paper: Retain until the dispensing pharmacist checks against patient profile

series_description: Pharmacy automated data processing system showing drug orders and dispensing records for drugs for patients.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years from the date of the last dispensing ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from the date of the last dispensing

series_description: Record of manufacturing, repacking, or unit dosing of medications. Shows manufacturer, manufacturer lot no., pharmacy lot no., expiration dates, repack size, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years or 1 year beyond the expiration date assigned to the drug being repacked, whichever is longer ; Paper: Retain 3 years or 1 year beyond the expiration date assigned to the drug being repacked, whichever is longer

series_description: Record of dispensing for chart changes of wards/units within the hospitals.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Original hard copy prescription or facsimile thereof (except C-II) issued by practitioner for patient/client on traditional prescription blanks/Doctors Orders. Records the date of dispensing and dispensing pharmacist's manually written initials (required by law even if computer system maintain dispensing records)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Form originating in the Pharmacy Service Center warehouse on which the receiving facility acknowledges receipt of shipments via the drug truck. It lists the items shipped, quantity shipped, and quantity received.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until order has been checked in or until any delivery problem has been resolved ; Paper: Retain until order has been checked in or until any delivery problem has been resolved

series_description: Form used by Pharmacy Services Center to internally track all outdated controlled substances. Also used to match DEA Form 41 with transaction date. Includes description of drug. date received, transaction code, lot no., expiration date, distributor, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Any other record not specifically mentioned in the Pharmacy Services retention schedule that documents dispensing or distribution of medication.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Form generated by the mental health clinics and sent to Central Pharmacy listing the medications on which refills are requested. Includes facility name, client no., client name, Rx no., medication to be refilled, authorizing signature, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year after receipt ; Paper: Retain 1 year after receipt

series_description: Record containing all information for repack production of drugs. Includes drug name and strength, bottle size, manufacturer, repack date, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year beyond the expiration date of the most recent drug repacked on the form ; Paper: Retain 1 year beyond the expiration date of the most recent drug repacked on the form

series_title: Report of Theft or Loss of Controlled Substances
series_description: Report to the DEA detailing any theft or loss of controlled substances.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Form used to document drugs the Pharmacy Service Center returns to vendors
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain 3 years

series_description: Record of medications originally obtained from the Pharmacy Service Center warehouse which are being returned, per return policy, for which the hospital pharmacy will received credit in their budget.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years
